# Security Policy

This repository is a public technical evidence and documentation repository for PHX IIoT.

It does not contain the core deployment engine, Ignition gateway scripts, plant credentials, customer-specific topology, production runtime exports, or private deployment logic.

If you notice sensitive information in this repository, please report it privately instead of opening a public issue.

Do not disclose the following in public issues:

- plant-specific credentials
- customer data
- PLC addresses
- Ignition gateway exports
- production topology details
- internal network information
- sensitive runtime screenshots or logs

Public issues may be used for documentation feedback, architecture questions, non-sensitive example feedback, and read-only field validation discussion.
